Author: AemiliusXIV
Name: Orchestrion Aria
Punchline: BGM replacement with local audio support
Description:
Play and replace FFXIV background music. Supports local MP3/WAV files from your PC alongside all in-game tracks, with fade transitions and volume sync.

Originally by perchbird & Meli: https://github.com/perchbirdd/OrchestrionPlugin
Changelog: Renamed to Orchestrion Aria. Import your settings and song replacements from the original Orchestrion plugin via the Settings window.

Author: AemiliusXIV
Name: Party Sorter
Punchline: Drag party-list cards to reorder party members.
Description: Hold Ctrl (configurable) and drag a party-list card onto another to reorder. Saves each group's preferred order by member identity and automatically restores it when the same members meet again — perfect for statics that want a consistent layout every pull. Supports per-group auto-apply modes, locking saved orders against accidental overwrites, and per-duty separate orders.
